ERIC M. HIGBY Chief of Police
JEFF L. LEININGER Deputy Chief
Rochelle Police Department 416 N. Sixth Street Rochelle, Illinois 61068-1540 www.police.rochelle.net
Non-Emergency (815) 562-2131
Fax: Admin (815) 562-6736 Dispatch Center (815) 562-4869
To Whom It May Concern:
Attached to this letter are copies of the police reports you requested. To the best of my knowledge and ability, these copies represent a true and accurate final copy of the reports. I have redacted specific items in some reports and such redactions were done pursuant to 5 ILCS 140/7(1)(b)&(c) "Exceptions to Release of Information" under the Illinois Freedom of Information Act.
The exceptions referenced above relate to private information (5 ILCS 140/7(1)(b)) and personal information (5 ILCS 140/7(1)(c)) that are exempt from public disclosure.
If you have any questions concerning the response to your request you may reach me or Chief Eric Higby, Monday through Friday 8:30 am - 4:30 pm at the Rochelle Police Department (815) 562-2131.
Sincerely,
x
Sandy Sullivan #120 Comm Supervisor FOIA Officer Rochelle Police Department 416 N. 6th St. Rochelle, IL 61068 (815) 562-2131
